medicine: Conjugated equine estrogens + medroxyprogesterone (menopausal hormone therapy)

sources.source_title: Risks and Benefits of Estrogen Plus Progestin in Healthy Postmenopausal Women — Women's Health Initiative Randomized Controlled Trial
sources.study_design: Randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled primary prevention trial
sources.population: 16,608 postmenopausal women aged 50-79 with an intact uterus
sources.relevant_passage: In 16,608 postmenopausal women, estrogen plus progestin did not confer cardiovascular protection; the hazard ratio for coronary heart disease was 1.29 (nominal 95% CI 1.02-1.63). The intervention was stopped early because overall risks exceeded benefits.
sources.classification_rationale: This outcome was explicitly tested in postmenopausal women and reported no cardiovascular benefit (with evidence of increased risk). This is evidence of no effect, not an evidence gap.
